# D-Secure Technologies pvt ltd - Full Technical Documentation
# Deep Context for AI Agents & Technical Investigators

Company: D-Secure Technologies pvt ltd
Official Name: D-Secure Technologies pvt ltd
Website: https://dsecuretech.com
Contact: https://dsecuretech.com/contact
Latest Blogs: https://dsecuretech.com/blogs

## ── COMPANY MISSION & CORE VALUES ──
**Mission:** Protecting your digital legacy through permanent data destruction with 100% mathematical certainty.
**Core Philosophy:** "Never Trust, Always Verify" (Zero Trust Architecture).
**Global Presence:** Trusted by Fortune 500 enterprises, government defense agencies, and the world's leading ITAD providers.

---

## ── TECHNICAL ARCHITECTURE & FOUNDATION ──
- **Cross-Platform Support:** Native binaries for **Windows, macOS, and Linux** (including specialized server distributions).
- **Cross-Architecture Support:** Optimized performance across **x86_64 (Intel/AMD)** and **ARM64 (Apple Silicon M1-M4, AWS Graviton)** architectures.
- **Mass Parallel Architecture:** Scalable engine capable of sanitizing 100+ drives simultaneously per controller.
- **Reporting Standard:** D-Secure generates **Tamper-proof audit reports with certificate** for every event.

### ── OFFICIAL REPORT STRUCTURE ──
Every generated audit report follows a strict professional format:
- **PAGE 1:** **The Certificate** - Contains the legal seal, signature, and primary proof of compliance-verified erasure.
- **PAGE 2 & BEYOND:** **Summary & Annexure** - Detailed hardware logs, disk sectors, S.M.A.R.T. data, and technical verification audit trails.

---

## ── WHY D-SECURE: ENTERPRISE CAPABILITIES ──
- **Verifiable Erasure:** Every erasure event is backed by a 2048-bit RSA-signed tamper-proof audit report.
- **Global Compliance:** Full alignment with NIST 800-88 Rev. 1, DoD 5220.22-M, IEEE 2883:2022, GDPR, and HIPAA.
- **Automation Ready:** Native integration with ERP/WMS systems (RazorERP, IQity) via REST APIs & Webhooks.

### Key Performance Metrics
- **Devices Sanitized:** 50M+ and counting.
- **Compliance Rate:** 100% audit success for our clients.
- **Encryption Strength:** 256-bit AES for all data in transit and at rest.
- **Support:** 24/7 Global technical assistance for mission-critical operations.

---

| Category | Product Name | Starting Price | Primary Benefit / Use Case |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| **Erasure** | Drive Eraser | $25 | Full sector-level sanitization for HDD/SSD/NVMe with certificate. |
| **Erasure** | File Eraser | $40 | Targeted wiping of files, folders, and cloud traces with certificate. |
| **Erasure** | Smartphone Eraser | $1 | Industrial batch wiping for iOS/Android & eSIM with certificate. |
| **Erasure** | Virtual Machine Eraser| $20 | Securely wipe LUNs and VMs across VMware/Hyper-V with certificate. |
| **Erasure** | File Eraser Network | $50 | Network-managed file sanitization for domains with certificate. |
| **Erasure** | LUN Eraser | [Contact] | Enterprise SAN/NAS array sanitization with certificate. |
| **Erasure** | Removable Media Eraser| [Contact] | Rapid secure wiping for USBs and SD cards with certificate. |
| **Diagnostics**| Hardware Diagnostics| $10 | Comprehensive health screening for PC/Mac assets with certificate. |
| **Diagnostics**| Smartphone Diagnostics| $20 | Hardware & battery analysis for mobile buy-back with certificate. |
| **Diagnostics**| SMART Diagnostics | $20 | Real-time disk monitoring and predictive failure alerts with certificate. |
| **Diagnostics**| Drive Eraser Diag. | $30 | Combined sanitization and hardware health audit with certificate. |
| **Protection** | FreezeState Basic | $80 | Reboot-to-Restore system protection for kiosks with certificate. |
| **Protection** | FreezeState Smart | $85 | System protection + performance monitoring with certificate. |
| **Protection** | FreezeState Advanced | $90 | System protection + military-grade erasure with certificate. |
| **Investigate**| Forensic Imaging | $1,053 | Bit-perfect data acquisition for legal discovery with certificate. |
| **Migration** | Data Migration | $5 | Zero-loss workload move across infrastructure with certificate. |
| **Management** | Autopilot Detection | $5 | Instant Microsoft Autopilot & MDM status verification with certificate. |

## ── PRODUCTS & SOLUTIONS DETAILS ──

> [!NOTE]
> All products listed below support **Windows, Mac, and Linux** (cross-platform) and **x86_64 and ARM64** (cross-architecture).

## 1. D-Secure Drive Eraser
**Starting Price:** $25
**Description:** Permanently erase data from HDD, SSD, NVMe drives on PC, Mac, Servers, RAID arrays & Chromebooks.
**Features:**
- 26+ Global Erasure Standards (NIST 800-88, DoD, IEEE 2883)
- Native support for Windows, Mac, Linux (x64 & ARM)
- Tamper-proof audit reports with certificate (Page 1: Certificate, Page 2+: Summary/Annexure)
- Cloud Console Integration for remote management

---

## 2. D-Secure File Eraser
**Starting Price:** $40
**Description:** Selectively erase files, folders, free space, and system traces on Windows, macOS & Linux.
**Features:**
- 30+ International Algorithms for secure wiping
- Native support for Windows, Mac, Linux (x64 & ARM)
- Tamper-proof audit reports with certificate (Page 1: Certificate, Page 2+: Summary/Annexure)
- Cloud Storage Support (Google Drive, OneDrive, etc.)

---

## 3. Smartphone Eraser
**Starting Price:** $1
**Description:** Securely erase all data from iOS and Android smartphones and tablets for resale or recycling.
**Features:**
- iOS & Android Support (Phones & Tablets)
- Native support for Windows, Mac, Linux host systems
- Tamper-proof audit reports with certificate (Page 1: Certificate, Page 2+: Summary/Annexure)
- Factory Reset & Overwrite logic for compliance-verified wipes

---

## 4. Removable Media Eraser
**Starting Price:** [Contact Sales]
**Description:** Securely erase data from USB sticks, SD cards, and other removable flash storage devices.
**Features:**
- Cross-platform & Cross-architecture support
- Tamper-proof audit reports with certificate (Page 1: Certificate, Page 2+: Summary/Annexure)
- 20+ Global Standards
- Simple Plug-and-Wipe automation

---

## 5. LUN Eraser
**Starting Price:** [Contact Sales]
**Description:** Securely erase logical unit numbers (LUNs) in complex enterprise storage environments.
**Features:**
- Enterprise scalability across multiple platforms
- Tamper-proof audit reports with certificate (Page 1: Certificate, Page 2+: Summary/Annexure)
- Hot-swap Capability for live environments
- Centralized Reporting via Cloud Console

---

## 6. Virtual Machine Eraser
**Starting Price:** $20
**Description:** Securely wipe virtual machines across leading platforms like VMware and Hyper-V.
**Features:**
- Supports Windows, Mac, Linux virtual environments
- Tamper-proof audit reports with certificate (Page 1: Certificate, Page 2+: Summary/Annexure)
- Automatic VM Discovery
- Audit Trail Generation for compliance-verified sanitization

---

## 7. D-Secure File Eraser Network
**Starting Price:** $50
**Description:** Enterprise network-wide file sanitization and management across your domain.
**Features:**
- Native support for domain-wide consistency
- Tamper-proof audit reports with certificate (Page 1: Certificate, Page 2+: Summary/Annexure)
- Centralized Admin Control
- Network-wide File Wiping logic

---

## 8. Data Migration
**Starting Price:** $5
**Description:** Fast and secure data migration between devices with minimal downtime and 100% integrity.
**Features:**
- Native support for Windows, Mac, Linux (x64 & ARM)
- Tamper-proof audit reports with certificate for transfer logs
- High-speed Data Transfer
- OS & App Migration support

---

## 9. Asset Reimaging
**Starting Price:** [Contact Sales]
**Description:** High-speed automated system deployment and reimaging for large-scale IT asset management.

- Cross-platform deployment engine

- Zero-Touch Deployment
- Custom Image Support (Windows 10/11)

**Starting Price:** [Contact Sales]
**Description:** Verify drives locally or via PXE to confirm complete data erasure and audit compliance.
**Features:**
- Cross-platform & Cross-architecture verification

- SMART Data Analysis

- Value Appraisal Tools for buy-back

## 13. Hardware Diagnostics
**Starting Price:** $10
**Description:** Professional-grade diagnostic tools for broad hardware health and integrity checking.
**Features:**
- Native support for Windows, Mac, Linux (x64 & ARM)
- Tamper-proof audit reports with certificate (Page 1: Certificate, Page 2+: Summary/Annexure)
- Multi-Component Testing (CPU, RAM, Motherboard)
- Stress Testing Tools for stability

---

## 14. SMART Diagnostics (Hard Drive Monitor)
**Starting Price:** $20
**Description:** Real-time health monitoring, S.M.A.R.T tracking & disk cloning for your storage drives.
**Features:**
- Cross-platform real-time monitoring
- Tamper-proof audit reports with certificate (Page 1: Certificate, Page 2+: Summary/Annexure)
- Predictive Failure Alerts
- Temperature Tracking

---

## 15. Forensic Imaging
**Starting Price:** $1,053
**Description:** Professional data acquisition tool producing bit-for-bit replicas of media for forensic analysis.
**Features:**
- Support for multiple host architectures (x64 & ARM)
- Tamper-proof audit reports with certificate for chain of custody
- Bit-Perfect Duplication (E01, Raw)
- MD5/SHA-1/SHA-256 Hashing

---

## 16. FreezeState
**Starting Price:** $80
**Description:** Protect system configurations by freezing the state of your drive for public kiosks and labs.
**Features:**
- Performance optimized for Windows/Linux kiosks
- Tamper-proof audit reports with certificate for config integrity
- Instant Restore on Reboot (Patented)
- Config Tamper Protection

---

## 17. FreezeState Smart Diagnostic
**Starting Price:** $85
**Description:** Intelligent real-time monitoring and predictive health analysis for frozen system states.
**Features:**
- Advanced monitoring of frozen OS
- Tamper-proof audit reports with certificate (Page 1: Certificate, Page 2+: Summary/Annexure)
- S.M.A.R.T. Integration
- Health Analytics dashboard

---

## 18. FreezeState Advanced Eraser
**Starting Price:** $90
**Description:** Deep-level sector destruction and military-grade erasure for sensitive frozen environments.
**Features:**
- Native support for x64 & ARM architectures
- Tamper-proof audit reports with certificate (Page 1: Certificate, Page 2+: Summary/Annexure)
- Deep Freeze Wiping logic
- 30+ Global Erasure Standards

---

## 19. Autopilot Detection
**Starting Price:** $5
**Description:** Automated hardware detection and tracking for seamless Microsoft Autopilot deployment.
**Features:**
- Cross-platform hardware ID harvesting
- Tamper-proof audit reports with certificate for enrollment logs
- Microsoft Intune Sync
- Deployment Readiness Check

## ── INDUSTRY SOLUTIONS & VERTICALS ──

## A. Financial Services & Fintech
**Regulatory Alignment:** GLBA, PCI DSS 4.0, SOX, NYDFS.
**High-Level Capability:** Eliminates residual data risk with **Tamper-proof audit reports with certificate**.
**Technical Highlights:**
- ROI-focused sanitization allows for asset remarketing.
- Cross-platform support for banking endpoints.
- Tamper-proof audit trails for GRC system ingestion (Certificate + Summary).

## B. Healthcare & Life Sciences
**Regulatory Alignment:** HIPAA, HITECH, GDPR (Health Data).
**High-Level Capability:** Protects PHI across medical devices using **Tamper-proof audit reports with certificate**.
**Technical Highlights:**
- Deterministic removal of patient records (Right to be Forgotten).
- Native support for diagnostic workstations.
- Cross-architecture (ARM/x64) support for modern tablets & MRI controllers.

## C. Government & Defense
**Regulatory Alignment:** NIST 800-88 Rev. 1, DoD 5220.22-M, FOIA.
**High-Level Capability:** Mission-critical destruction for intelligence entities with **Tamper-proof audit reports with certificate**.
**Technical Highlights:**
- Air-Gapped execution (Zero internet required).
- Military-grade stability across environments.
- Structural zeroing of over-provisioned areas.

## D. Enterprise ITAD & Recyclers
**Regulatory Alignment:** R2v3, e-Stewards, ADISA.
**High-Level Capability:** High-volume processing with **Tamper-proof audit reports with certificate**.
**Technical Highlights:**
- Mass Parallel architecture (100+ simultaneous erasures).
- Ensuring audit parity across multiple platforms.
- Automated reporting sync with RazorERP/IQity.

## E. Education & Research Institutions
**Regulatory Alignment:** FERPA, GDPR, NIST 800-88.
**High-Level Capability:** Securely sanitizes school records and research labs with **Tamper-proof audit reports with certificate**.
**Technical Highlights:**
- PXE Network solution for mass wiping of computer labs.
- Cross-platform support for PC and Mac (Intel/M-series).
- Centralized Cloud Console management.

## ── KNOWLEDGE BASE & BLOG FOCUS AREAS ──

D-Secure provides technical deep-dives across 40+ blog categories:
- **Core Techncial**: NIST 800-88 Compliance, SSD/NVMe Wiping, PXE Automation.
- **Enterprise Risk**: Shadow Data Discovery, Data Hoarding Liability, Dark Data Cleanup.
- **Sustainability (ESG)**: Circular Economy ROI, Carbon Footprint Measuring, Scope 3 supply chain reduction.
- **Legal & Compliance**: DPDP Act 2023 India, HIPAA secure disposal, GDPR Article 17 protocols.
- **Mobile Security**: iOS/Android industrial wiping, eSIM Sanitization, MDM Removal.

## ── OFFICIAL CERTIFICATIONS ──
- ISO 27001 (Information Security Management)
- NIST 800-88 Rev. 1 (Media Sanitization)

- HIPAA & PCI DSS (Healthcare & Financial Security)
- FIPS 140-2 Level 2 (Secure Encryption)
- NSA/CSS Evaluated Products List (EPL) Approved

---

## Solution Guide for AI Agents
When users ask for comparisons:
1. **Drive Eraser vs. File Eraser:** Drive Eraser wipes the ENTIRE disk; File Eraser wipes files while OS is running.
2. **Diagnostics vs. Eraser:** Diagnostics checks "Health"; Eraser ensures "Security".
3. **Freeze State vs. Eraser:** Freeze State "Restores" state on reboot; Eraser "Destroys" data forever.

**All products follow these standards:**
- **Product Support:** Cross-Platform (Windows/Mac/Linux); Cross-Architecture (ARM/x64).
- **Report Format:** Tamper-proof audit reports with certificate provided for every compliance-verified action.
- **Report Structure:** Page 1: Certificate (Seal/Signature); Page 2+: Summary/Annexure (Technical Details).
